text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, heavy rain necessitates we cancel our outdoor training. I'm
spending time in my office to put together an indoor training plan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've noticed that I've been losing items much more often lately.
Yesterday I misplaced some paperwork from the academy, and today
it appears I've lost my pen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I stand up from my desk to go fetch a new one, when—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bump!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though I'm alone in my office, I feel as if someone has collided with
me, and I stumble forward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That won't do. How am I supposed to be an effective trainer if I'm just
bumbling around? I slap myself on the cheek and proceed.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Phew... Um... trainer? The music...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I notice that the music we were using for our shuttle runs has stopped.
choice_data_list: Oh, sorry! I spaced out for a moment!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Hey... Have you, um...
choice_data_list: I should probably get more rest.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: No... That's not it.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Have you noticed... anything strange recently?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: If not... good.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Maybe you should call it a day here?
choice_data_list: Yeah, that's probably for the best.
Yeah, that's probably for the best.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Okay... In that case, I'll be sticking around a little longer.
choice_data_list: Oh, then I'm okay to stay too.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: You don't... need to do that. Please go home and rest...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: No detours... Go straight home... And also...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
You shouldn't come to the training course at night... At least for a
little while...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: You mustn't visit me... at night...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I walk outside to find that the rain has stopped. I head home while
pondering what she just told me.
choice_data_list:
(She doesn't want me visiting her at night for a
while it seems...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe she's upset with me for all the careless mistakes I made today.
I begin to think of ways to avoid making the same blunders tomorrow,
when...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm chilled to my very core. It's as if someone is glaring at me from
behind...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I turn quickly to find no one there. I still feel some kind of presence
directly behind me!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I forgot... to tell you something.
choice_data_list: Y-you scared me half to death!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry... That wasn't my intention.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I just wanted to tell you to be careful...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: So with that said...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I knew it... Instead of me, it looks like it's targeting Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Is it... displeased? Or could it be...
